things.name: Tacugama Chimpanzee Sanctuary
things.description: Forest sanctuary caring for orphaned and rescued chimpanzees

things.name: Cotton Tree
things.description: 400-year-old cotton tree - the most powerful symbol of Freetown and freedom

things.name: Freetown Beach (Lumley Beach)
things.description: 5km Atlantic beach with beach bars and fresh barracuda grilling

things.name: National Museum of Sierra Leone
things.description: Colonial-era collection with Mende secret society initiation masks

things.name: Old Portuguese Steps
things.description: Historic steps where Europeans first landed with the oldest buildings in Freetown

things.name: Bunce Island Slave Fort
things.description: British slave trading fort ruins in the Sierra Leone River

things.name: St George's Cathedral (1828)
things.description: Oldest cathedral in West Africa built by liberated slaves

things.name: River Number Two Beach
things.description: Pristine beach with a freshwater river running into the Atlantic

things.name: Banana Islands
things.description: Three colonial-era islands with beaches and slave history

things.name: Groundnut (Peanut) Soup
things.description: Sierra Leone's national dish - palm oil and peanut broth with chicken and potato leaves
